race.comment: MANDRIANA (4) was well in the betting at Gatton on debut but just ran into one better on that occasion. Better for that race experience and where there's smoke there's fire. Rates the testing material with the 3kg claim from the low draw. SPIRIT OF RIVERTON (1) just missed the frame here on debut and will have come on with that run now under the belt. Capable of sharp improvement. DRACARIAN (2) has gotten better with each run and looks to be improving with racing. Top-three commodity. FLIRTATIOUS LASS (6) placed over this track and trip when facing the starter for the first time and hoop Tomizawa stays in the saddle. In the mix. REIGN OF DAME (11) next best despite the sticky alley.
